title: PL26 8RR, Danish Crown UK Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/DP3631RA/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Danish Crown UK Limited Installation name: Danish Crown Bugle Permit number: EPR/DP3631RA/V004  "
